IF TIMELY RESPONSES TO FIRST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT ARE NOT FILED PARKLYN BAY COMPANY SHALL REQUEST A DEFAULT WITHOUT DELAY. MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL SHOULD BE BROUGHT IN DEPARTMENT 206.
